series_metadata.series_description: All long term documentation relating to the removal or remediation of hazardous or solid waste from soils. Records include remediation and sampling plans, remedial action plans, removal actions, corrective action, urban setting designations, groundwater corrective measures plans, Ohio Administrative Code 3745-27-13 authorizations, and related correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: scanned. ; Electronic: Permanent unless records are otherwise maintained by a federal agency and Ohio EPA is not principal regulatory authority; in which case records may be maintained no longer of administrative value
